name: supply_chain_shipment
description: Transportation and logistics shipment data with delivery tracking and carrier metrics

generation.note: Weighted via seed column: 30% distribution_center, 70% Store
generation.expr: CASE WHEN destination_type_seed < 0.3 THEN 'distribution_center' ELSE 'Store' END

columns.name: destination_id
columns.description: Foreign key to distribution_centers or stores based on destination_type

generation.expr: CASE WHEN destination_type = 'distribution_center' THEN (id % 25) + 1 ELSE (id % 1000) + 1 END

generation.note: transit_days is an omitted seed column (1 to 6)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN delivery_probability > 0.2 THEN date_add(ship_date, actual_transit_days) ELSE NULL END

columns.name: on_time
columns.description: Whether shipment arrived on or before expected delivery

generation.expr: actual_delivery IS NOT NULL AND actual_delivery <= expected_delivery

columns.name: delay_hours
columns.description: Hours of delay (negative for early delivery, null if undelivered)

generation.expr: CASE WHEN actual_delivery IS NOT NULL THEN cast((unix_timestamp(actual_delivery) - unix_timestamp(expected_delivery)) / 3600 as int) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN transport_mode_seed < 0.60 THEN 'Truck' WHEN transport_mode_seed < 0.75 THEN 'Rail' WHEN transport_mode_seed < 0.95 THEN 'Intermodal' ELSE 'Air' END

generation.note: Weighted: 25% In Transit, 50% Delivered, 5% Delayed, 10% At Hub, 10% Out for Delivery
generation.expr: CASE WHEN status_seed < 0.25 THEN 'In Transit' WHEN status_seed < 0.75 THEN 'Delivered' WHEN status_seed < 0.80 THEN 'Delayed' WHEN status_seed < 0.90 THEN 'At Hub' ELSE 'Out for Delivery' END
